channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ebola Testing Has Improved in DRC, but Still Isn't Nearly Enough
item.description: The DRC has boosted Ebola testing capacity with two facilities near the epicenter, but it may still fall short.

item.title: White House Response to Hantavirus and Ebola Contrasts with COVID Criticisms
item.description: The administration imposed mandatory quarantine on two cruise ship passengers with hantavirus and is blocking Americans with Ebola.

item.title: Socioeconomic factors become 'biologically embedded' in children's brains
item.description: A study of over 2,300 children aged 9-10 found that socioeconomic factors accounted for most differences in brain development.

item.title: Japan reactor restart renews concerns over nuclear waste storage
item.description: The restart highlights a critical issue for Japan's nuclear program: a shortage of space for spent fuel and no clear disposal plans.
